growth_records.lvlwhy: species-level trait compilation (Madin) — no strain recorded in source
growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: patric.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.cite: Wang C et al. Epsilon-poly-L-lysine: Recent Advances in Biomanufacturing and Applications. Frontiers in Bioengineering and Biotechnology (2021). DOI:10.3389/fbioe.2021.748976. [PMC8506220]
growth_records.snippet: Streptomyces ahygroscopicus GIM8, fed batch fermentation 192 h, glucose + yeast extract, in situ product removal (D152 resin) -> 23.4 g/L (Liu et al. (2011))
growth_records.notes: Value CITED in this review (Wang et al. 2021, Front Bioeng Biotechnol) FROM primary paper Liu et al. (2011); not measured in the review. Volumetric productivity derived = 23.4 g/L / 192 h = 0.1219 g/L/h. Medium given only qualitatively (glucose + yeast extract), not quantified -> medium_composition_stated:false. No growth rate, biomass, or substrate uptake reported here; epsilon-PL is the excreted product.
